title: ComposableInputFormat
description: This directory contains the ComposableInputFormat class, which is a refinement of the InputFormat class that requires implementors to provide a ComposableRecordReader instead of a RecordReader. The createRecordReader method is the key algorithm in this class, which takes an InputSplit and a TaskAttemptContext as parameters and returns a ComposableRecordReader. This class collaborates with the ComposableRecordReader class, which is a key collaborator class, and also depends on the WritableComparable and Writable classes.

TITLE: ComposableInputFormat

DESCRIPTION:
This directory contains the ComposableInputFormat class, which is a refinement of the InputFormat class that requires implementors to provide a ComposableRecordReader instead of a RecordReader. The createRecordReader method is the key algorithm in this class, which takes an InputSplit and a TaskAttemptContext as parameters and returns a ComposableRecordReader. This class collaborates with the ComposableRecordReader class, which is a key collaborator class, and also depends on the WritableComparable and Writable classes.
